chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1115 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.5020/2022 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 19.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. On the last date of hearing, which was on 08.3.2023, which is over two years ago, learned counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioner. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to pursue this petition. Today, once again, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed / pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
